SHIVAM_CORE_V14: SYSTEM_OPERATIONAL_MANUAL

[01: ACCESS_PROTOCOLS]

User can unlock the vault using two primary methods: A) Original Photo + Password or B) Unique SKD Code + Password. If no password was set during encryption, the file will unlock instantly upon providing the Photo or Code.

REQUEST_ACCESS: If the user lacks the password, a 'Request Access' signal can be transmitted to the uploader. Approval is required unless accessed by SUPREME_ADMIN_ID: ashok91208@gmail.com.

[02: PHOTOSYNTHESIS_ENGINE]

MODE: STEGANOGRAPHY. This process multiplies image pixels to stitch data directly into the RGB matrix. Recommended for files under 50MB. This format is ideal for physical printing and scanning as data is part of the image's visual structure.

[03: DATA_WRAPPING_PROTOCOL]

MODE: DIGITAL_ENVELOPE. Used for heavy data (50MB to 2GB). It wraps files (MP3, Video, ZIP) into a secure header inside an Ultra-HD image. This mode maintains high-speed processing but is primarily for digital sharing, not physical printing.

[04: 360°_SMART_SCANNER]

The scanner utilizes Rotational Computer Vision. It can auto-align tilted, upside-down, or distorted photos. Use the TORCH button for low-light environments to ensure pixel extraction accuracy.

[05: SKD_UNIQUE_NAMING]

Every file is exported as: SKD-[TIMESTAMP]-[RANDOM_ID]. This ensures zero collision in the database. Deleting the SKD history from the dashboard will permanently purge the reference link from the cloud repository.

REQUEST_ACCESS_PORTAL

[06: BATCH_INJECTION_PROTOCOL]

Custom MB entry allows precision for non-standard file sizes (e.g., 168MB).

[07: THE 2GB UNIVERSAL LIMIT]

THRESHOLD: Single operation is restricted to 2048MB (2GB). You can mix unlimited files (MP3, MP4, TXT, APK) until the limit is reached.

[08: REMOTE_DECODING_LOGIC]

UNIVERSAL_HEADER: Every stitched photo contains a binary header at the start of the data segment. This allows any V14 system to identify the exact number of files and their formats without prior knowledge of the contents.

V14_TECHNICAL_DOCUMENTATION

[PROTOCOL_01] PHOTOSYNTHESIS

Hide data directly into RGB pixels. Printing/Photocopy in B&W mode supported. Limit: 50MB. Impact: Zero visual change.

[PROTOCOL_02] DATA_WRAPPING

Digital envelope encryption. Handles up to 2GB payload. Not suitable for printing, best for digital transmission.

[PROTOCOL_03] SKD_IDENTITY

Every file is assigned an immutable Search Code (SKD). Use this for remote retrieval without the physical image.

[PROTOCOL_04] APPROVAL_LOGIC

If uploader has not shared the password, a "Request Access" notification is sent directly to the uploader's dashboard.

V14_SYSTEM_DOCUMENTATION

1. TRIPLE-LAYER SECURITY LOGIC

A. Fingerprint Scan: Primary entry method. Requires Master Password for authentication. Directly linked to the physical device bio-sim.

B. Manual Override: A discreet entry node. Accepts either the Master Password or the User-Defined Bypass Key. Useful for quick access without animations.

C. Admin Request: If identity verification fails, user can send a real-time request to Admin Shivam (ashok91208). Entry is only granted after Admin approval via Firebase.

2. BYPASS KEY CONFIGURATION

Users can set a personal Bypass Key from the Secret World dashboard. This key acts as a 'Secondary Master' for manual entry nodes only.

3. AI-3 CAPABILITIES

AI-3 manages the Secret World. It handles Anything-into-Everything conversion, data wrapping, and SKD identity generation via voice commands.
